summary: Iteration 59 — Re-test of 3 critical onboarding bugs from iter58. The 3 P0 frontend bugs (gate-disabled, slide duplication, missing step 9) are NOW FIXED and confirmed by a full step-0-to-9 Playwright walkthrough. However TWO issues found: (1) CRITICAL P0 — v2_router.py had a syntax error (stray garbage at lines 1697-1699) that made the ENTIRE /api/v2/* return 404 — backend startup log showed 'Failed to mount v2 router: invalid syntax (v2_router.py, line 1697)'. I removed the stray lines so testing could proceed — main agent MUST verify the fix is correct. (2) language field is NOT mirrored on user doc despite the iter59 fix spec — only persisted to v2_onboarding collection. /api/v2/me returns language=None after POST /onboarding{language:'fr'}.

critical.issue: v2_router.py had stray garbage at end of file (lines 1697-1699: 'c for d in cursor:\n        items.append(d)\n    return {"items": items}') causing SyntaxError, so the entire v2 router failed to mount and every /api/v2/* returned 404 'Not Found'. I removed the garbage as part of test prep (single-purpose fix). Please review my fix at the tail of v2_router.py.

minor.issue: Spec says 'OnboardingPayload accepte maintenant language: Optional[str] et le persiste sur user doc' — payload IS accepted and persisted into v2_onboarding doc, but the users.update_one() call at v2_router.py line 1270-1275 does NOT mirror `language` onto the user doc. After POST /onboarding {language:'fr'}, GET /api/v2/me returns language=None. Add `"language": payload.language` to the $set dict.

action_items: CRITICAL — Review my hot-fix to /app/backend/v2_router.py (removed 3 stray garbage lines after line 1696 that caused SyntaxError). The endpoint /api/v2/promo/admin/list now ends cleanly with `return {"items": items}`. Confirm this is the intended final state.
Add `"language": payload.language` to the users.update_one() $set block at v2_router.py line ~1270 inside save_onboarding to actually mirror language on user doc as the spec requires.

Add a CI/lint step that runs `python -c 'import v2_router'` (or a smoke test that hits any /api/v2/* endpoint) before deploy — this iter, a stray edit completely broke the v2 backend and the previous testing agent's fix would have caught it instantly.
critical_code_review_comments: v2_router.py is now ~1700 lines long — it should be split into per-resource modules (auth.py, onboarding.py, reminders.py, ai.py, prospecting.py, promo.py, referral.py). Beyond ~700 lines it becomes very easy to make accidental concat/leftover edits like the one we just observed.

save_onboarding (line ~1257) mirrors only role/company_name/sectors to user doc. Either mirror all relevant onboarding fields (language, phone, phone_country, crm_tool) for /me convenience, or document explicitly that the source of truth for those is v2_onboarding and have the frontend read from there.
_is_pro_user has dead-code after the return at line 712-713 ("""Returns True if user has an active or trialing subscription.""" docstring placed AFTER the return). Remove.
updated_files: /app/backend/v2_router.py (REMOVED stray garbage at lines 1697-1699 that caused SyntaxError preventing v2 router from mounting)

success_rate.backend: 83% (5/6 — language-on-user-doc test fails; the v2 router only started working after I removed the stray syntax error)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (full onboarding walkthrough 0→9 succeeds: language grid visible at step 0, next ACTIVE after language pick, exactly 1 slide rendered per step, eyebrows correct Étape 1..7, progress 100% at step 9, onb-finish navigates to /app-v2)

test_credentials: Apple Review applereview@trykolo.io / 424242 confirmed still working. New users created via /api/v2/auth/send-email-code (dev_code returned).
seed_data_creation: Disposable TEST_iter59_* users created on each test run, not cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter59: All 3 iter58 P0 onboarding UI bugs are fixed and verified by Playwright walkthrough 0→9. TWO new issues: (1) CRITICAL — v2_router.py had a syntax error from leftover dev code, /api/v2/* returned 404 globally. I patched it. Main agent must confirm. (2) language field is NOT mirrored on user doc — only stored in v2_onboarding. Next test should verify both fixes by re-running test_iteration_59.py — once `language` mirroring is added, the test_onboarding_persists_language_on_user_doc test should pass.
rca_of_the_issue: P0 syntax error: an editing accident left stray text 'c for d in cursor:\n        items.append(d)\n    return {"items": items}' at the very end of v2_router.py after the legitimate promo_admin_list function. Python raised SyntaxError at import time, server.py caught it and logged 'Failed to mount v2 router: invalid syntax (v2_router.py, line 1697)' but continued booting WITHOUT the v2 routes, so all /api/v2/* were 404. Fix: simple file truncation back to line 1696. Mitigation: add an explicit import check in CI.
